title: Spanish Basics
shortSummary: Your first steps into Spanish — the alphabet, pronunciation rules, basic sentence structure, and how Spanish works as a language. This module gives you the foundation to start reading, hearing, and speaking Spanish from day one.
whyItMatters: Every language journey starts here. Understanding how Spanish pronunciation works, how letters sound different from English, and how basic sentences are structured means you will not develop bad habits that slow you down later. Spanish is phonetic — once you learn the rules, you can pronounce any word. That is a massive advantage over English.
coreConcepts: The Spanish alphabet and how each letter sounds
Vowel sounds — the five pure vowels that never change
Gendered nouns — every noun is masculine or feminine
Articles: el, la, los, las, un, una
How Spanish pronunciation differs from English
The concept of formal vs informal speech (tú vs usted)
